chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1865 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ For order as to non-prosecution of petition. ----------- Dated; 8th May 2024 Mr. Abdul Wahab Bhutto, Advocate for Petitioners. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned counsel for the petitioner requests for time to comply with office objection. He was enquired, as to whether election was held as per schedule, in response to which, he has submitted that election has been held, whereas, result has also been announced and the new management has also taken over the charge. As we have already observed that the matter pertaining to the elections dispute of the Bar Associations can be resolved by the specific forum provided under the law for its resolution under the Pakistan and Sindh Bar Councils Acts, whereas, in the instant petition, election has already been held, therefore, we are of the view that instant petition, besides being misconceived, is otherwise become infructuous. While confronted with hereinabove position, vide order dated 19.04.2024 while issuing notices to the respondents, petitioners have not been able to pay cost and supply copy so that notices could be issued and today the matter has been fixed for order as to non- prosecution. In view of hereinabove facts and circumstances of the case, no fruitful purpose will be served out to grant time to the petitioners to pay cost and supply copy for issuance of notices to the respondents, as the petitioners have fresh cause of action, which can be agitated before the relevant forum / tribunal as provided under the law.

While confronted with hereinabove position, vide order dated 19.04.2024 while issuing notices to the respondents, petitioners have not been able to pay cost and supply copy so that notices could be issued and today the matter has been fixed for order as to non- prosecution. In view of hereinabove facts and circumstances of the case, no fruitful purpose will be served out to grant time to the petitioners to pay cost and supply copy for issuance of notices to the respondents, as the petitioners have fresh cause of action, which can be agitated before the relevant forum / tribunal as provided under the law. Accordingly, instant Constitution Petition is dismissed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
